calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-25-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioners Weiping Wu, father and Rifang Xue, mother of minors Shuyi Wu and Jianhao Wu present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Terry Tse.
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Shuyi Wu to Shirley Shuyi Wu and Jianhao Wu to Jimmy Jianhao Wu.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
